login.title: LMU Denmark
login.subtitle: Sign in or create an account with Discord
login.discordHint: New accounts must be created with Discord. You must be a member of the LMU Denmark Discord server. After that you fill in email, name and LMU name.
login.guestDialogDesc: Enter the guest code you received from LMU Denmark. Guests can see everything on the site, but cannot sign up for races.
login.legacyToggle: Existing user without Discord? Sign in with email
login.legacyHint: You still need to link Discord afterwards to use the site.
login.notMemberTitle: You are not a member of the LMU Denmark Discord
login.notMemberDesc: To create an account you must first be a member of the LMU Denmark Discord server. Use the invite below, accept it, and try signing up again.

home.title: News
home.subtitle: Latest completed races and results.
home.emptyState: News will appear here when the first division is marked as completed with results.

leagues.title: Leagues & races
leagues.subtitle: Pick a league to see divisions, rules and sign up.
leagues.empty: No leagues yet. An administrator must create a league first.
leagues.loginToSeeTimes: Sign in to see lap times
leagues.noTimes: No times yet — upload a race file to appear on the leaderboard.

guest.cannotSignup: Guest users cannot sign up for leagues
